label: Transparent Hollyhock motif
workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #00ffff, then local chroma-key removal to RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Hollyhock transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated hollyhock tower motif for a design-system catalog, no surrounding garden scene, no props, no text.
Subject: A tall vertical hollyhock flower tower: stacked open rose-pink saucer blossoms and buds along a strong upright leaf-green stem, broad matte leaves with veined texture, a few seed-brown pods and dried bracts near the lower stem; accurate cottage-garden botanical form, crisp silhouette edges, opaque petals suitable for clean cutout, tactile leaf and seed-pod detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete full-height cutout with generous padding; emphasize a vertical publishing-system rhythm like a column or page spine; do not crop the top flowers, leaves, or base.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves rose pink petals, leaf green foliage, seed brown pods, and warm cottage wall neutral undertones.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ffff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ffff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no insects, no animals, no full landscape, no sky, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Hollyhock" / "Hollyhock Tower", derived from the hollyhock tower cutout already provided in context.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, vertical composition, and interaction language from the hollyhock motif image. The board must visibly respect rose-pink petals, leaf-green foliage, seed-brown pods, warm cottage-wall neutrals, and a vertical publishing system mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Hollyhock", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use editorial product typography, readable sans UI, tall display headings, vertical rhythm, and Japanese typography guidance for publication dashboards, content queues, and compact metadata.
UI coverage: show buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact dashboard metrics, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, and content publishing cards.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, vertical publishing dashboard, 8px radius cards and controls, refined operational tool rather than marketing page.
Color palette: rose pink primary from petals, deeper petal ink for foreground, leaf green and olive support, seed brown structure, cottage wall plaster off-white, limewash grey borders, parchment surface, warm vine shadow. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Visual details: upright stem spine, stacked blossom markers, leaf-vein dividers, seed-pod bullet accents, cottage-wall paper grain, vertical section rails, editorial baseline rhythm, restrained rose focus rings.
Text: short readable labels only; exact section labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Morphous Hollyhock" / "Hollyhock Tower" design-system board, translated from the hollyhock motif cutout and the light board already provided in context. It must feel like the same system in dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent hollyhock tower motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, typography, and the vertical publishing-system mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Hollyhock", "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; keep the same editorial product typography, readable sans UI, tall display headings, vertical rhythm, and Japanese typography guidance from the light board.
UI coverage: show buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact dashboard metrics, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, and content publishing cards.
Visual details: dark background derived from warm vine shadow and seed-brown depth, rose-pink primary from petals, leaf green and olive support, muted cottage wall border lines, parchment highlights for text, seed-pod bullet accents, subtle plaster grain, upright stem spine, stacked blossom markers, leaf-vein dividers, editorial baseline rhythm, restrained rose focus rings.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, vertical publishing dashboard, 8px radius cards and controls, refined operational tool rather than marketing page.
Text: short readable labels only; exact section labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
